Dhyana Sophia & Dunja Perko  ·  Ptuj, Slovenia

AQUAQIFLOW Inner Waters Slovenia Edition · September 2026

Reconnect with the medicine of water and the wisdom of the elements, in the heart of Slovenia's oldest city.

Retreat 18–20 Sept Training 23–27 Sept Terme Ptuj, Slovenia
Explore Programs

The Water Remembers

Inner waters represent the essence of the relationship we have to ourselves and to every being on this planet. The more fluid our inner waters, the better we feel, the deeper we connect.

Through gentle somatic movement, transformative aquatic bodywork and sacred practices, we offer the framework for healing your inner waters — in the heart of Slovenia's pristine nature and ancient thermal waters.

Are you ready to accept the invitation?

Two Paths · One Water

Choose Your Journey

🌿 Retreat · For Healing

18 – 20 September 2026 · 3 days

Inner Waters
Immersive Retreat

A 3-day immersion for those seeking restoration, presence and deep reconnection with their own rhythm — through water, movement and somatic integration.

  • QiFlow — Qi Gong inspired movement
  • Aquatic activation in thermal waters
  • Somatic emotional integration
  • Individual 1-1 sessions
  • Chi Nei Tsang abdominal massage
  • Sacred herbal ceremonies
  • Morning yoga & meditation
  • Half board included · Terme Ptuj

🌊 Training · For Learning

23 – 27 September 2026 · 5 days

Aquaqiflow
Foundational Training

A 3-day professional training for therapists, facilitators and wellness practitioners — learn to integrate aquatic therapy and somatic tools into your practice.

  • Foundations of aquatic therapy
  • QiFlow facilitation techniques
  • Somatic emotional accompaniment
  • Nervous system regulation tools
  • Trauma-informed principles
  • Embodied awareness practices
  • Chi Nei Tsang abdominal massage
  • Sacred herbal ceremonies
  • Supervision and peer practice
  • Half board included · Terme Ptuj

What Makes This Special

A Convergence of Two Cultures,
Two Continents, One Water

🌿

Janzu Aquatic Therapy

Deep healing through water — individual floating sessions that release the body's held tensions and emotions.

🙌

Chi Nei Tsang

Abdominal massage from Traditional Chinese Medicine — releasing tension stored in the organs and restoring inner flow.

🌊

Thermal Waters

Private access to Terme Ptuj's renowned thermal healing waters — the oldest city in Slovenia holds ancient wisdom.

🌱

Sacred Plant Medicine

Ceremonial herbal teas, morning rituals and Slovenian plant wisdom woven through every day of the experience.

🌿

Sacred Herbal Ceremonies

Morning teas and evening ceremonies with Slovenian wild herbs — ancient plant wisdom that prepares body and spirit for each day of practice.

🌲

Nature Immersion

Forest bathing, wild herb foraging and silent walks in pristine Slovenian nature — deep connection to the land as part of the healing.

Terme Ptuj
Slovenia

Grand Hotel Primus ****
Ptuj · Slovenia
The Venue

Ancient thermal waters in Slovenia's oldest city

  • Grand Hotel Primus **** Superior
  • Private Cesarjev thermal pool (34°C)
  • Dedicated massage & meditation room
  • Half board — breakfast & dinner included
  • Unlimited access to thermal baths
  • Sauna access (2h daily)
  • Historic city of Ptuj — Roman heritage

Your Guides

Two Cultures · One Vision

Mexico meets Slovenia — a convergence of healing arts, wild nature and human connection across two continents.

Founder of Aquaqiflow · Mexico

Dhyana Sophia

Embodied Wisdom Guide
Somatic Healing Facilitator
QiFlow & Aquatic Therapy

15+ years devoted to embodied healing experiences. Dhyana brings QiFlow, somatic emotional integration and aquatic therapy — guiding with deep integrity and the gift of holding transformational space where body, water and soul reconnect.

Co-Facilitator · Slovenia

Dunja Perko

Healer & Shamanic Herbalist
Janzu Aquatic Therapist
Chi Nei Tsang Practitioner

Former diplomat turned healer, Dunja founded Reviving Inner Wisdom in 2024. Trained in Traditional Chinese Medicine, Chi Nei Tsang, Janzu aquatic therapy and shamanic healing, she brings the wisdom of Slovenian land and plant medicine — she is the local guide and soul of this experience.
